case_title: LACROSBY, JOSE VS JACKSON, CYNTHIA DBA SALON BLK.

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, CYNTHIA DBA SALON BLK.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LACROSBY, JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, CYNTHIA DBA SALON BLK. $575.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, CYNTHIA DBA SALON BLK.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $985.00 FILED BY LACROSBY, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, CYNTHIA DBA SALON BLK. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, CYNTHIA DBA SALON BLK.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $300.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, CYNTHIA DBA SALON BLK.
